title: 25 & Glowing
subtitle: A bright young chapter 🌼
message: At 25, you were unstoppable. Full of dreams, full of spark — the world hadn't seen anything yet. This page is a little time capsule for that Mergui: the one who was just getting started, with her whole life blooming ahead of her. 🌼
quote: She believed she could, so she did.

highlights.caption: Graduation day — the beginning of everything

memories.title: The new job
memories.description: You showed up on day one nervous and brilliant. You had no idea how much you'd grow.

memories.title: That birthday party
memories.description: Your friends surprised you. You actually cried. It was the best kind of surprised.

wishes: May 25 always remind you of who you were becoming
May your boldness of that year never fully leave you
